chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P No. D – 1516 of 2024 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case 1. For orders on office objection at flag ‘A’ 2. For orders on CMA No.6044/2024 (Ex.A) 3. For hearing of main case 22.12.2025 Mr. Shabbir Ali Bozdar, Advocate along with Petitioner No.1, namely Safdar Ali Tanwri Mr. Ghulam Abbas Akhtar Awan, Advocate for Respondents Syed Naveed Ahmed Shah, Deputy Attorney General >>>>>..<<<<< Learned counsel for the Respondents/Pakistan Railways submits that the entire outstanding payments have now been made to the Petitioners. Learned counsel for the Petitioners, however, contends that the Respondents have failed to issue experience certificates to the Petitioners. In view thereof, the Respondents are directed to issue experience certificates to the Petitioners within a period of thirty days from today. Learned counsel for the Petitioners further disputes the payment allegedly made by the Respondents to the Petitioners. Since the controversy raised involves disputed questions of fact, which cannot be adjudicated upon by this Court in the exercise of its writ jurisdiction, the Petitioners are at liberty to avail an appropriate remedy before the competent forum in accordance with law. The petition is accordingly disposed of in the above terms. Judge Judge ARBROHI/PS
